airport.name: Wuhan Tianhe International Airport
airport.toCity: Metro Line 2, taxi, or airport shuttle.

transport.metro: Extensive network with 8 lines, covers major areas and attractions.
transport.taxi: Use official taxis with meters; agree on fare beforehand if needed.
transport.didi: Didi app for reliable ride-hailing; similar to Uber.
tips: Use metro during rush hours to avoid traffic congestion.
Have destinations written in Chinese for taxi drivers.
Purchase a metro card for convenient travel.

payment.alipay: Widely accepted; download app and link foreign credit card.
payment.wechatPay: Common payment; set up with local phone number if possible.
payment.cash: Still accepted but less convenient; small denominations useful.
payment.foreignCard: Visa and Mastercard accepted in tourist areas, not always.

tips: Book near metro stations for easy exploration.
Check reviews and ratings before booking.
Try local breakfast specialties like hot dry noodles.
Eat at street stalls for authentic flavors.
Be mindful of food allergies and spice levels.

commonScams: Taxi drivers not using meters or overcharging fares.
Fake tour guides offering overpriced or misleading tours.

emergency.localTip: Keep your hotel address in Chinese for quick directions.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (March-May) or Autumn (September-November) for pleasant weather.
touristTips: Learn basic Mandarin phrases for better communication.
Use mobile payment apps where possible.
Carry sunscreen and water in summer.
Respect local customs and queue lines.
Keep valuables secure in crowded areas.
